description_long: This is a modern quadcopter drone with a sleek, angular central body finished in a dark, metallic color. It features four extended arms, each supporting a large, black propeller with red-tipped motor mounts. The drone is equipped with a visible camera gimbal mounted beneath the front of the body, suggesting capabilities for aerial photography or surveillance. The landing gear consists of two sturdy, horizontal legs that provide stable support when on the ground. The overall design is aerodynamic and functional, with exposed rotors and a compact, streamlined chassis. The materials appear to be primarily lightweight composites and plastics, with some metallic elements for structural integrity.
description: A sleek quadcopter drone with four black propellers, a dark angular body, and a front-mounted camera gimbal. It has sturdy landing legs and a modern, aerodynamic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the camera gimbal, angular body, and all four propellers clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved top shell, camera gimbal beneath, and the horizontal landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the body, propeller arms, and the absence of a camera.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the camera gimbal partially visible.
